item: D8-C1 cross-venue funding-rate dispersion (Binance vs Bybit)
build: executable lagged-sign (no look-ahead): position p_t=sign(d_{t-1}) per symbol, pnl=p_t*d_t, market-neutral; 4 taker legs/flip @5bps; deadband hysteresis swept; dual-venue holding haircut charged in realistic case
interpretation: Lagged dispersion IS predictable and harvestable gross, but (1) the wedge is ~0.08 bps/8h net -> economically trivial ($36-75/mo on $100k), (2) it fails Deflated Sharpe at honest N (the high annualized Sharpe is a 1095-periods/yr annualization artifact; realized 4.9 sits at the 4.0 multiple-testing noise floor), and (3) on a pure-signal/gross basis the funding LEVEL carry (27.2) dominates dispersion (6.4) -> dispersion is redundant with and sub-cost relative to level. Confirms and strengthens the prior KILL with a non-look-ahead executable build.
